title: A campus farewell for Jennifer Mnookin
summary_en: Faculty, staff and students joined the send-off event, where UW leaders shared their heartfelt well-wishes for the university’s 30th chancellor.
title_cn: A campus farewell for Jennifer Mnookin

title: Tracing life’s hidden histories
summary_en: Professor Claudia Solís-Lemus’ lab brings unique statistical rigor to far-reaching biological questions, from the origin of life to the diversity we see today.

title: Remembering Jon Miskowski, PBS Wisconsin’s emeritus director of television
summary_en: Miskowski leaves a legacy of statewide community focus and programmatic vision that advanced PBS Wisconsin’s prominence nationally in education, innovation and fundraising.
title_cn: Remembering Jon Miskowski, PBS Wisconsin’s emeritus director of television
